title: The Labouchere System Guide: Mastering Cancellation Betting for Consistent Profit

content:
CANCELLATION MASTERY 2026

The **Labouchere System**, also referred to as the **Split Martingale**, is designed for those who want to achieve a specific profit target while managing their risk. In 2026, it remains a favorite for Canadians who play Baccarat and Roulette because of its logical, sequence-based approach. Unlike systems that rely on doubling after a loss, Labouchere allows you to 'split' your target profit into manageable chunks, crossing them off as you win until you hit your goal. This guide provides the tactical blueprint for 2026.

The Setup: Defining Your Profit Target

The first step is deciding how much you want to win (your 'Target Profit'). Let’s say your target is **$100**. You then split that $100 into a sequence of smaller numbers, for example: **[ 10, 20, 20, 20, 20, 10 ]**.

1

The Stake

Your next bet is always the sum of the first and last numbers in your sequence. (Initially: 10+10 = $20 stake).

2

On Win

If you win, cross out the first and last numbers. Once all numbers are gone, you have hit your $100 profit target.

3

On Loss

If you lose, add the amount you just bet to the end of the sequence. (Example: [ 10, 20, 20, 20, 20, 10, 20 ]).

Logic: Why the Labouchere System is Resilient

The core strength of Labouchere is that it doesn't require a 50% win rate to turn a profit. Because one win clears two numbers, you can remain profitable even if you lose more rounds than you win. This mathematical balance is what makes it a 'pro' choice for 2026. Practice this sequence on our **Dice Simulator** to master the speed of calculation.
